resources.string: Insulin preset for Humalog and NovoRapid / NovoLog
Insulin preset for Lyumjev (classic pharmacokinetic model)
Glucodynamic model for Lyumjev U100 (standard concentration). This model automatically adjusts the duration of insulin action (DIA) based on bolus size.

Glucodynamic model for Lyumjev U200 (2x concentrated). This model automatically adjusts the duration of insulin action (DIA) based on bolus size. YOU MUST HALVE YOUR BASALS AND DOUBLE YOUR ISFs BEFORE USE!
Allows you to define the peak of the insulin activity and should only be used by advanced users
DIA of %1$f too short - using %2$f instead!
